author: ondreu
description: A beautiful, customizable home screen — search, dashboard, and launcher in one, with many card options and embeds. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ondreu
manifest.description: A beautiful, customizable home screen for your vault — search, dashboard, and launcher in one.
manifest.name: Hearth

name: Hearth

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
## ✨ New

- **Natural-language task dates** — type due/scheduled dates in plain language.
- **Free-form tiles** — tiles can overlap; drag & drop with a dashed drop-target ghost. Auto-shift is an opt-in beta per card.
- **Mobile search** — search optimized for mobile.
- **Edge-merging cards** — adjacent cards merge their borders.
- **Relative date labels for tasks** — Today / Tomorrow / Friday…
- **Recurring-task completion checkbox** — undoable, rendered before the task text; Kanban recurring checkbox inline with the task text.
- **Hide titles** — hides card headers (not the dashboard header).

## 🛠 Improvements & Fixes

- Daily/embed cards now use a single scrollbar; the embed scrolls instead of the card body.
- Daily note: floating open button on the card (no body overflow); header hidden by default in arrange mode.
- Fixed daily/embed horizontal scroll — clip x-overflow, wrap text.
- Fixed tile drag offset (transform-based); overlap glow always on.

## 🧹 Plugin Review

- Manifest version is numeric-only (`1.6.0`) — fixes the failed-review error.
- Replaced direct `element.style.X = …` assignments with `setCssStyles()` / CSS classes.
- Added the `u` flag to regexes containing surrogate-pair emoji (Tasks-plugin markers).
- Use `activeDocument` instead of `document` for popout-window compatibility.
- Removed unnecessary type assertions.
- Replaced CSS `:has(...)` selectors with explicit body modifier classes (`.is-embed-host`, `.is-jot-host`).

## 📌 Notes

Two Obsidian-linter recommendations were intentionally **not** adopted in this release: the `setWarning` → `setDestructive` and `display()` → `getSettingDefinitions()` migrations. Both replacement APIs require Obsidian **1.13.0+**, while the plugin still targets **1.8.7+**. They'll be addressed when `minAppVersion` is bumped.

## ⚙️ Installation

Requires Obsidian **1.8.7+**. Add `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release to your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/hearth/` folder.

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
## 1.6.0.5-beta

- **Live tile reflow while dragging** — launchpad/command tiles now shift around the one you're dragging in real time (phone-widget style), so you can see exactly where it'll land. A dashed placeholder marks the target cell.
- **Hide header in arrange mode** — a new "Hide header" toggle in the Arrange toolbar hides the dashboard header (title + search) so the full board is visible end-to-end while you place cards.

Install: drop `main.js`, `manifest.json` and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/hearth/`.
releases.name: 1.6.0.5-beta

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
1.6.0.4-beta

- Fix: editable daily/embed (and text) cards still stacked multiple scrollbars. The .hearth-jot wrapper now clips and the card body stops scrolling while it holds a .hearth-jot, leaving the visible preview or textarea as the single scroll container.
releases.name: 1.6.0.4-beta

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
1.6.0.3-beta

- Fix: embed/daily cards still showed multiple scrollbars. The embed host is now the single scroll container; the card body stops scrolling while it holds an embed, so themes' .markdown-rendered overflow can no longer stack a second vertical bar.
- Recurring-task completion checkbox is now undoable: unchecking removes today from complete_instances and rolls scheduled back to today, so a mistaken completion can be cancelled.
- The recurring checkbox now sits before the task text (list + kanban), not below it.
releases.name: 1.6.0.3-beta

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
1.6.0.2-beta

- Fix: daily-note / embed cards showed three scrollbars (one horizontal + two vertical). The card body is now the sole vertical scroll container; the embed host is non-scrolling so a theme's .markdown-rendered overflow can't stack a second vertical bar. Scaled (zoomed) embeds keep their own scroll box.
- Recurring TaskNotes tasks now complete per-occurrence the way TaskNotes does: a small checkbox (list + kanban) appends today's date to complete_instances and advances scheduled to the next occurrence derived from the recurrence rule (DTSTART/FREQ/INTERVAL/BYDAY). Status is left untouched, so a recurring task rolls forward instead of being retired. Dragging a recurring task into the done column does the same.
- Non-recurring tasks keep the existing drag-to-column behaviour.
releases.name: 1.6.0.2-beta

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Task due dates now show as short relative labels** — the tasks card renders due dates as **Today**, **Tomorrow**, **Yesterday**, the weekday name for the rest of the week (e.g. **Friday**), **Next Friday** / **Last Friday** for the week after that, and a compact "15 Jul" beyond. The ↻ recurring suffix and the overdue tint are preserved. (Natural-language input — `📅 tomorrow`, `📅 next friday`, `📅 in 3 days` — still works too, so writing and reading a due date both stay plain English.)

This is a small follow-up to 1.6.0-beta: the "natural language dates" feature was meant as **display**, not (only) input parsing. 1.6.0-beta already parsed natural-language input; this release adds the relative **display** labels.

The other 1.6.0 features (free-form launchpad tiles, centred mobile search, edge-merging cards) are unchanged.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ondreu/Hearth/compare/1.6.0-beta...1.6.0.1-beta
releases.name: 1.6.0.1-beta

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Natural-language task dates** — write `📅 tomorrow`, `📅 next friday`, `📅 in 3 days`, `📅 end of month` (or the same wording in a TaskNotes `due` field) and Hearth resolves it to a date. The wording is shown next to the parsed date so you keep recognising what you typed. EN + Czech, ISO passthrough.
- **Free-form launchpad tiles** — drag a tile to drop it anywhere on the card. It pins to that grid cell instead of being forced into the top-to-bottom / left-to-right flow. Double-click a pinned tile to release it back to auto-flow.
- **Centred mobile search** — in Mobile-only mode the search field is back in the middle of the screen.
- **Edge-merging cards** — when two cards are snapped together, their shared border drops out and the touching corners sharpen so the pair reads as one continuous tile (like grouped Android notifications). Live during drag/resize, recomputed on reflow.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ondreu/Hearth/compare/1.5.2...1.6.0-beta
releases.name: 1.6.0-beta

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
Beta. Fixes from 1.5.0-beta feedback:

- Default background now loads from raw.githubusercontent.com (works without a release asset)
- Search autocomplete raised above all dashboard elements (was behind card headers)
- Click-outside closes the autocomplete when clicking anywhere off the search field (title, button, dashboard)
- Filter chips span exactly the search field width (not the New-note button), edge-to-edge
- Tile resize grips always visible in arrange mode (drag overlay was hiding them); grip enlarged to 16px
- Mini calendar month-nav arrows: stronger contrast + thicker stroke
- Fit-to-page is now the default
- Other files filter always visible when there are non-folder files
releases.name: 1.5.1-beta

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
# Hearth 1.5.0

A redesigned dashboard experience, plus recurring tasks and many polish fixes.

## Highlights

- **CSS-grid tiles** — Links/launchpad and Commands tiles now live on a fine
  CSS grid (44 px cells, 4 px snap) with independent column and row spans.
  Drag a tile to reorder; drag the corner grip to resize. Default tile is 2×2.
- **Ambient default background** — a soft, blurred backdrop ships out of the
  box, so the dashboard looks good before you've configured anything.
- **Recurring TaskNotes tasks** — tasks with a `recurrence` RRULE show a ↻
  badge next to the next-occurrence date (read from `scheduled`), tinted with
  the accent color. Hover reveals a plain-English schedule ("Repeats every
  week"). Overdue recurring tasks tint like one-offs.
- **Smarter task sorting** — due → scheduled → priority → created.
- **Kanban drop outlines** — dragged cards preview where they'll land.
- **Calendar today outline** — today's cell stays visible under the heatmap
  tint.
- **Search layout polish** — autocomplete click-outside, restored field
  width, larger tile grip.
- **Fit-to-page default-on** — fresh installs lock to one screen; stuck cards
  auto-recover onto the board on render.
- **Overhauled starter dashboard** — a redesigned default layout with exact
  coordinates.

## Fixes

- Card drag overlay behaves correctly over tile cards.
- Tile grip visibility and contrast improved.
- Calendar arrow targets now work in dark themes.
- "Other" file-type filter hides when there are no unmatched files.
- Default background uses a CDN URL (raw.githubusercontent was blocked by
  Obsidian's CSP).
- Many card-drag and fit-to-page edge cases.

Full beta history: 1.5.0-beta → 1.5.10-beta.

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
Beta release. Highlights:
- Animated default background (assets/default-bg.gif)
- Lucide icon option for dashboard switcher buttons
- Copy card to another dashboard / Duplicate dashboard
- Fit-to-page: toolbar always visible, bottom row no longer clipped
- Edit-mode header floats over the card (faithful preview)
- TaskNotes quick-add reveals on card hover
- Mini calendar month-nav arrows visible
- Filter chips span the full search width
- New 3D files filter (step/stp/stl/obj/fbx/gltf/glb/...)
- Search autocomplete closes on outside click
releases.name: 1.5.0-beta

releases.author: ondreu
releases.description:
## 1.4.1 beta

### Added
- **Card opacity cascade** — opacity now layers global → dashboard → card. Per-card override slider in card settings (Colors); per-dashboard override in dashboard settings. Default lowered to 0.6.
- **Query card tiles** — "Saved search" renamed to "Query"; new Display dropdown (List / Tiles) renders results as an icon grid like the links card.
- **Hearth default background** — a bundled background image ships with each release. Default for fresh installs. (Placeholder image included; replace `assets/default-bg.png` before final release.)

### Fixed
- **Fit-to-page** — toolbar (Arrange / Add card) no longer clipped; cards can't be dragged or dropped off-screen; drag & resize clamps to the visible board.
- **Tile resize in arrange mode** — resize grip now sits above the drag overlay so it can be grabbed.

**Install**: copy `main.js`, `manifest.json` and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/hearth/`.
releases.name: 1.4.1-beta

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.4.0

### Fixed
- **Fit-to-page overflow** — when a dashboard was set to *Fit to page*, the area below the fold was still interactive: cards could be dragged into it, new cards were inserted off-screen, and the board grew past one screen. The dashboard and grid now clip in fit mode so nothing spills past the visible page.
- **Activity heatmap scaling** — heatmap cells used a fixed `aspect-ratio: 1/1` that conflicted with the grid tracks, causing overflow and bad scaling when the card's aspect ratio didn't match `weeks:7`. Cells now fill their grid cell so the grid scales smoothly with the card footprint.

### Added
- **Card opacity** — a new global slider (Settings → Dashboard → Card opacity) tints card surfaces so the dashboard background shows through without dimming content.
- **Independent tile resize** — in arrange mode, link and command tiles show a resize grip on hover; drag right to grow width, down to grow height — the two axes are independent, so tiles can be any proportion. (Resize grips are now only visible in arrange mode.)
- **Kanban quick-add** — the TaskNotes "new task" button floats over the board's top-right corner with no reserved row; transparent at rest, fully opaque on hover.

### Changed
- **Arrange mode no longer shifts cards** — the toolbar stays floating above the grid in both rest and arrange modes, so entering arrange mode keeps cards where they were; *Add card* and *Done arranging* sit on the same row the compact *+* occupied.
- **README** — completely rewritten with a full feature overview, table of contents and an updated roadmap.

**Install**: copy `main.js`, `manifest.json` and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/hearth/`, or update via Obsidian's community plugin browser.
